ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "on_road_old" INTEGER /* Initial on-road price of the vehicle */,
  "on_road_now" INTEGER /* Current on-road price of the vehicle */,
  "years" INTEGER /* Age of the vehicle in years */,
  "km" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle in kilometers */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the vehicle (1-5) */,
  "condition" INTEGER /* Condition of the vehicle (1-10) */,
  "top_speed" INTEGER /* Top speed of the vehicle in km/h */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Manufacturing year of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel the vehicle uses */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type (e.g., front-wheel drive, rear-wheel drive) */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Size of the engine in liters */,
  "seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the vehicle */,
  "doors" INTEGER /* Number of doors in the vehicle */,
  "sold" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the vehicle has been sold */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the vehicle record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the event belongs to */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., maintenance, ownership transfer, accident) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle at the time of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event occurred */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the event (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the record belongs to */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., oil change, tire rotation) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle at the time of maintenance */,
  "mechanic_name" TEXT /* Name of the mechanic who performed the maintenance */,
  "mechanic_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the mechanic */,
  "service_center" TEXT /* Service center where the maintenance was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownership_history" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the record belongs to */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "ownership_date" TEXT /* Date of ownership transfer */,
  "owner_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "owner_address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "previous_owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the previous owner (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownership_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_records" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the record belongs to */,
  "accident_date" TEXT /* Date of the accident */,
  "accident_description" TEXT /* Description of the accident */,
  "police_report_number" TEXT /* Police report number associated with the accident */,
  "insurance_claim_number" TEXT /* Insurance claim number associated with the accident */,
  "damage_cost" REAL /* Cost of damage resulting from the accident */,
  "repair_status" TEXT /* Status of repairs (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_records_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, inventory management, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the record belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the vehicle in the inventory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the vehicle is stored */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
